title: Add /rewind slash command to restore prior conversation state
description: CC ref: commands/rewind/index.ts:3-13 (aliases: checkpoint, supportsNonInteractive: false). CC opens an interactive message-selector UI (context.openMessageSelector()) to pick a prior message; conversation and code state are restored to that point. OC: command entirely absent. Parent spec: #539. Phase 2 impl tracked in #554.
